{{Quote|Aren't you supposed to wish that the Force be with them, General?|Gett|<ref name="Republic Commando: Triple Zero">''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''</ref>}}
'''Gett''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Clone Commander/Legends|commander]] who served in the [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Throughout the conflict against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]], he was assigned to [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]]. He also served alongside [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gree (clone trooper)/Legends|Gree]], another clone commander in the 41st, who at some point introduced him to the writings of [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]]. Unlike most [[Cloning/Legends|clones]], he did not consider his [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] General to be an omnipotent warrior, and Etain liked and respected him for that.

==Biography==
Gett was the commanding officer of the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] ''[[Fearless]]'' one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first]] battle of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. He personally commanded [[Improcco Company]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dinlo]], and respected Tur-Mukan's decision to not leave [[Sarlacc Battalion A|Sarlacc Battalions A]] and [[Sarlacc Battalion B|B]] during the [[Skirmish at Dinlo|skirmish]] at Dinlo, personally accompanying her to rescue them.

Along with the rest of the 41st, Gett was deployed to the planet [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] to take part in the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|battle]] to prevent the Separatists capturing the native [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]]. During the battle, the 41st were deployed by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] in a counter-charge against Separatist forces advancing out of the [[Wartaki Sea/Legends|Wartaki Sea]] up a beach head toward the city. They successfully managed to repel the invaders with the aid of the Wookiees, but took heavy casualties in doing so.

During the battle, [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], an order from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to execute the Jedi, was issued and Gett, believing the Jedi had betrayed the Republic turned on the Jedi along with the rest of the clone army. Several Jedi on Kashyyyk were successfully [[Death/Legends|killed]], along with many others across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], but Gett learned that Yoda had escaped, killing Gree in the process and turning the Wookiees against the Republic. After several [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of fighting their former Wookiee allies, Gett and the 41st established peace on Kashyyyk, and were then reformed into the 41st Stormtrooper Legion in service to the new [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], Gett held the rank of [[Stormtrooper Commander/Legends|Stormtrooper commander]] and gave a orientation seminar to a group of Imperial [[Cadet/Legends|cadets]], in which he spoke about his experience at Kashyyyk.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Gett is the [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] word for "nut."
